S.FORM: Hillery Brown sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1912 , ryax sa tay 30 nqu tay 7, Hillery Brown, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1991) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ƒßillerj Œ≤rown s~…ïraral ƒßja î…£a s~…ïis~…ïjuw na nŒ≤a, wal malaxmis~…ïuq qanij la. kawas~…ï taj **** , rjax s~…ïa taj ** nqu taj *, ƒßillerj Œ≤rown, s~…ïquliq na p îunro. (mƒßuqil s~…ïa kawas~…ï taj ****) ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î lis~…ïts~…ï o* national Œ≤as~…ïketŒ≤all as~…ïs~…ïo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ï
